summary: Backend testing of Allogo Taxi App completed. All 24 tests passed (100%). Focus on airport flat rates, authentication, VTC fares, driver availability, ride creation, wallet balance, and admin promo codes APIs.
passed_tests: ✅ Passenger login (passenger@test.com/password) - returns token and role=passenger
✅ Driver login (driver@test.com/password) - returns token and role=driver
✅ Admin login (admin@volttaxi.com/admin123) - returns token and role=admin
✅ /auth/me endpoint returns user info with valid token
✅ Tour Eiffel → CDG: 69€ (Rive Gauche - base 65€ + 4€ supplement) - CORRECT
✅ Champs Élysées → CDG: 60€ (Rive Droite - base 56€ + 4€ supplement) - CORRECT
✅ CDG → Tour Eiffel (from airport): 69€ (Rive Gauche) - reverse direction CORRECT
✅ VTC Van fare includes 10€ van supplement
✅ Driver availability toggle - set available with location
✅ Ride creation returns reservation_number and pending status
✅ Wallet balance returns balance in EUR
critical_code_review_comments: Airport flat rate logic is correctly implemented - Tour Eiffel (lat 48.8584 < 48.86) correctly identified as Rive Gauche
Seine latitude boundary (48.86) properly divides Paris into Rive Droite (north) and Rive Gauche (south)
All airport flat rates match expected values from Préfecture de Police de Paris 2025
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Airport flat rates thoroughly tested and verified. Key coordinates used: Tour Eiffel (48.8584, 2.2945) = Rive Gauche, Champs Élysées (48.8698, 2.3077) = Rive Droite, CDG Airport (49.0097, 2.5479), Orly Airport (48.7262, 2.3652). Seine latitude boundary = 48.86.

features_verified.authentication: WORKING - All 3 roles (passenger, driver, admin) can login
features_verified.ride_creation: WORKING - Creates pending rides with reservation numbers
features_verified.admin_promo_codes: WORKING - List and create promo codes
